The Event Bonus is for sale every day in the [[Vending Machine]] for 1 {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}}. Depending on the [[Events|Weekly Event]] that is currently happening, this box will reward different items.

[[Lottery Week]] - {{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Bonus|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +20}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +3|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|Carnival Balloon, +100}}


[[Wishing Week]]
* {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +20}}
*
* {{RewardIconWithText|Mystery Ash, +100}}


[[Offering Week]]
* {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +20}}
*
* {{RewardIconWithText|Spirit Crystal, +100}}


[[Category:Reward Pack]]
